content:
I am delighted to share that I have joined JurisIQ Global as a Junior Associate.

In this role, I will be working in Document Review, eDiscovery, and Data Privacy, contributing to high-quality legal support while ensuring accuracy, confidentiality, and compliance with data protection requirements. I look forward to strengthening my expertise, taking on new challenges, and contributing meaningfully to the team's success.

I would like to express my sincere gratitude to PUJA KHANDELWAL for her trust, guidance, and support throughout the recruitment process.Thank you for believing in my potential and providing me with this wonderful opportunity.

I am excited to begin this new chapter with JurisIQ Global and look forward to learning, collaborating, and growing with the organization.

#JurisIQGlobal #JuniorAssociate #DocumentReview #eDiscovery #DataPrivacy #LegalOperations #CareerGrowth #ProfessionalDevelopment #NewBeginnings
comment: Document review and eDiscovery are increasingly shaped by data quality, defensible workflows, and privacy considerations. Building that discipline early will be a strong foundation for long-term legal operations work.
